capabilities: Compose with multiple public HTTP services
limitations: no public TCP or UDP relay
no host network or host port
no host bind or Docker socket

security.secrets: Return environment names and sensitivity only. Never return values.
security.authority: AI output is a proposal. Deterministic schema, semantic and policy validation is final.

resourcesAndPlacement.builder: Luma Builder executes checkout, analysis and builds

rules: infer names from Compose, examples and framework code
API_KEY AUTH CREDENTIAL DATABASE_URL PRIVATE_KEY PASSWORD SECRET TOKEN are sensitive
NEXT_PUBLIC_ NUXT_PUBLIC_ PUBLIC_ REACT_APP_ VITE_ are public
never infer configured values from source

healthAndFrameworkRecipes.health: Prefer declared local HTTP health, otherwise conservative root.

verdicts.deployable: Supported and no required input is missing.
verdicts.needs_input: Supported but required environment input is missing.
verdicts.unsupported: A deterministic blocker exists; deployment is forbidden.
verdicts.diagnostic_failed: Diagnostic pipeline failed; do not classify user code as unsupported.

blockers.rule: AI cannot remove deterministic blockers or weaken unsupported.
